title: Parameter arrays in module parameter port list

features.name: module parameter with unpacked array type
features.description: Code should include a module declaration with a parameter that is an unpacked array of integers
features.snippet: module a #( parameter int p[4] = '{1, 2, 3, 4} ); endmodule

features.name: localparam unpacked array passed to module parameter
features.description: Code should include a localparam unpacked array being passed to a module's unpacked array parameter during instantiation
